sections.paragraph:
verb לרשום

to write down, take notes, inscribe; register; prescribe; sketch

verb להירשם

be written down, inscribed; be registered; be perscribed; be sketched

verb להתרשם

be impressed

verb להרשים

to impress, make an impression

masculine noun and adjective

registrar, registerer, designer

masculine noun רושם

impression, show, appearance, seemingness, semblance, trace, figure; effect, impact, magnificence

masculine noun

monitor, register, recorder
